description_long: This is a pair of high-top athletic sneakers featuring a predominantly black synthetic upper with vibrant accents. The shoes have pastel blue and pink laces, and the tongue and collar are highlighted with pink details. The midsole displays a gradient of blue and pink, adding a dynamic visual effect, while the outsole is a pale off-white with a bold black zigzag traction pattern. The shoes have perforated side panels and a visible air unit in the heel, suggesting comfort and breathability. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban streetwear or casual athletic use.
description: A pair of high-top black sneakers with pastel blue and pink accents, gradient midsoles, and bold zigzag-patterned off-white outsoles.
description_view_0: Front and sole view showing pastel blue and pink laces, pink tongue, and the bold black zigzag pattern on the off-white outsole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gradient blue-pink midsole, perforated panels, and visible air unit in the heel.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the lacing, rounded toe, and the smooth transition of colors on the midsole.
description_view_3: Rear and side view showing the high collar, heel tab, and the continuation of the gradient midsole around the back.
